title: AIS Agentic Engineering Framework â€” Repository Initialization State
description: JSON Schema 2020-12 for tracking the overall framework initialization state of a target repository. Written to docs/assessment/initialization-state.yaml during the brownfield initialization workflow.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI for this document.

initialized_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when framework initialization was first started on this repository.

last_updated.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent state change.

repo.description: Repository identifier â€” path on disk or GitHub owner/repo slug.

framework_version.description: Version of the AIS Agentic Engineering Framework used for this initialization.

phase.description: Current initialization lifecycle phase. Advances forward only â€” never revert phase without explicit override.

assessment_path.description: Relative path to the readiness-assessment.yaml file produced by the assessment step. Null until the assessment is complete.

config_path.description: Relative path to the aispec.config.yaml file written during initialization. Null until the initialization step is complete.

completed_steps.description: Ordered list of initialization steps that have been completed and verified. Valid step names: assessment, questionnaire, config, governance-registry, agent-catalog, work-management, mcp-config, branch-protection, pr-template, codeowners, documentation.

pending_steps.description: Ordered list of initialization steps that have not yet been completed. This list shrinks as steps move to completed_steps.

work_management_provider.description: The work management provider configured for this repository. Null until the work-management step is complete.

notes.description: Append-only log of timestamped notes recorded during initialization. Never edit or remove existing notes.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this note was recorded.

note.description: Free-text note, decision, or observation recorded during initialization.
